name: Group 1171281726 — What we do / Three rooms in one school

background.note: Off-white section panel spanning full viewport (1920px) between stats-bar and why-bodhi.

innerContainer.horizontalSidePadding: 312px each side (1920 - 1294 = 626 → 313 each, Figma rounds to 312)

body.text: 200-hour and 300-hour residential and weekend programmes, taught with rigour

body.note: Body text is truncated in Figma frame (ends with 'beginner-'); full copy likely continues. Treat as 2-line preview.

layout.divider: None — cards are separated by 20px gap; section panel has top/bottom borders via 1px solid rgba(86,147,65,0.19)

interactiveElements.suggestedBehavior: Subtle shadow elevation increase + 1px brand-shade border on hover; cursor:pointer; entire card is the click target wrapping the CTA link.

tokenMapping.#00785d (card title): Slightly darker brand variant — map to a darker shade of brand-primary; in our token set treat as brand-primary applied at heading weight, OR introduce `--brand-primary-700` if not present.
tokenMapping.#00707c (eyebrow): Teal accent — close to brand-dark (#00282c) shifted lighter. Recommend treating as `--brand-accent-teal` or reusing eyebrow color from header tokens. Not brand-primary.
tokenMapping.#2a2420 (heading): foreground (near-black warm). Map to existing foreground token.
tokenMapping.#fdfdfd (section bg): background / `--background` (near-white). Section panel uses near-white, not brand-lite (#f0fff8).
tokenMapping.rgba(86,147,65,0.19) (section panel bord: Faint sage tint. Approximate via 1px hairline; can use border color `rgba(86,147,65,0.19)` literally or token `border` with reduced opacity.
tokenMapping.brand-shade (#8ee0ce): Reserve for hover state border / accent ring on cards.
tokenMapping.brand-lite (#f0fff8): Reserve for hover/active card background tint (optional).

fonts.Manrope: Already in project — used for eyebrow, body, CTA.
fonts.Host Grotesk: Used for section heading (52/53). Ensure Host Grotesk SemiBold is loaded.
fonts.Instrument Sans: Used for card titles (29/35.7). Ensure Instrument Sans SemiBold (with wdth=100 variation) is loaded.

responsiveStrategy.desktop (≥1280px): 3 cards in a row at 418px each, 20px gap, container max-width 1294px.
responsiveStrategy.tablet (768–1279px): Likely 2-up or single column stack — Figma frame shows desktop only; default Next.js implementation: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3` with `gap-5`.
responsiveStrategy.mobile (<768px): Single column, cards become full-width with reduced padding (e.g. 28px 24px).

implementationHints: Use shadcn `Card` (already in codebase) with custom `rounded-[35px]`, `border-[#f0f0f0]`, `shadow-[0_19px_47.7px_0_rgba(230,230,230,0.25)]`.
Section wrapper: `bg-[#fdfdfd] border-y border-[rgba(86,147,65,0.19)] py-16` (vs absolute positioning from Figma).
Container: `max-w-[1294px] mx-auto px-6` with flex-col gap-10.
Eyebrow + heading stack: `text-center` group with `gap-1.5` between eyebrow and h2.
Map CTA `→` arrow as inline glyph; consider switching to a lucide icon for hover translate-x animation.
Body text in Figma is single-line truncated; in code allow it to wrap naturally — the truncation is a Figma artifact (whitespace-nowrap on one card).
a11y:
Eyebrow should be `

` with `aria-hidden=false` (decorative); use a single `

` for 'Three rooms in one school.'
Each card should be wrapped in `<Link>` so the whole surface is the hit target; CTA text remains visible but the `→` arrow should be `aria-hidden`.

Color contrast: #00785d on #ffffff = 5.5:1 (AA OK for large text); #424242 on #ffffff = 10.4:1 (AAA OK); #009877 on #ffffff = 3.6:1 (AA OK for ≥18.66px, but CTA is 13px — consider strengthening to brand-dark on hover/focus).

rawCodeReference: See get_design_context output — preserved verbatim in this JSON above.
